steps.title: Identify Miguel's stated goal
steps.content: The strongest clue: “Miguel was hoping not only to meet us but to make the acquaintance of the poet himself.” This directly reveals what he wanted.

steps.title: Match the goal to the answer choice
steps.content:
Miguel anticipates having the opportunity to be introduced to both the sisters and their father. says Miguel “anticipates having the opportunity to be introduced to both the sisters and their father,” which captures his stated intention.

The other answers either attribute the narrator's learning progress to Miguel, invent a mentorship request, or add unsupported details about poetry recitation.

That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
